---
title: "Mary Nunn Harvey"
---

## Mary Nunn Harvey

**Dates:** (1834/5-1897)

### Description

donor of the Girls’ Friendly Society Home at Shanklin, Isle of Wight

### Biography

Her death was registered in the last quarter of 1897.

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, Oct 18th [1897[[footnote:1]]]](../letters/3385_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
